rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEPHEN WAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 3/23/20. full notes will be emailed to counsel by noon on 3/3/20, however, the following is noted: the Schedule of Gains is not proper, as it fails to show the carry value and payment received (see PC 1060 et seq.); the petition alleges that funds were held in interest bearing accounts (paragraph 18), but then also alleges that there were -0- receipts from 4/10/16 to 1/17/20; no account is listed as holding the sales receipts from the sale of the business; and no bank statements are filed to verify the assets on hand as of the end of the account period (LRSF 14.62). deadline for filing required documents in order to avoid an automatic continuance is noon on 3/16/20.
